MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, LATA M. COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-26-1997 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JUDGE DIANE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, ALL PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD, JUDGMENT SUBMITTED.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: LITTMAN, STEVEN EDWARD SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR PATEL, LATA M.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DUNKLEY, PATRICIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3161 16TH ST, #405, STAYED UNTIL NOV-28-1997, LEASE FORFEITED, WRIT MAY ISSUE BUT NO EVICTION UNTIL AFTER 11/28/97 AT 5PM. IF DEFT. VACATES TIMELY PLAINTIFF WILL PAY HER $250.00 IF KEYS ARE RETURNED AND PREMISES LEFT IN BROOM CLEAN CONDITION.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
